channel.title: CompletableFuture on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in CompletableFuture on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts

item.title: CompletableFuture made life easy, running things asynchronous
item.description: Let’s assume you have to invoke two REST APIs and then combine the result. You can run them one by one and then accumulate the result. It looks easy. However, if each call takes up some time, the total time would be pretty significant. However, we can reduce the time if we can run these two asynchronously, making them parallel. That’s where CompletableFuture comes into play. Let’s see a code-
